title: Dot Marker Kids
author: Deokgu Studio
description:
Big circles. Big smiles. Toddler-sized fun.

This dot marker activity book is purpose-built for little hands holding their first bingo daubers. Every page is a small win - building hand-eye coordination, color recognition, counting, and confidence.

Who it's for:
- Toddlers and preschoolers ages 1-4
- Homeschool families building early fine-motor skills
- Daycares, preschools, and Sunday schools
- Grandparents stocking the activity drawer

What's inside:
- 50+ original dot-marker pages: animals, vehicles, alphabet letters, numbers 1-10, shapes, fruits, weather
- Big, well-spaced dots sized for standard bingo daubers and Do-A-Dot markers
- Single-image pages on bright white paper - no clutter, no overwhelm
- Large 8.5 x 11 inch format so little arms can work without crowding
- Mix of "fill the dots" pages and "follow the pattern" pages for gradual difficulty

Independent play, screen-free quiet time, restaurant rescue, road-trip lifesaver, preschool prep all wrapped into one. Toddlers feel proud when they finish a page - and parents finally get five minutes to drink coffee while it's still hot.

Order it today and watch your kid choose this book over the iPad.
categories: BISAC: JUVENILE NONFICTION / Activity Books / Coloring
